features.name: division with width-mismatched operands and narrower result
features.description: Code should include a division operation where the numerator has a narrower bit width than the denominator, and the result width equals the numerator width

features.name: division result width equals numerator width with larger denominator
features.description: Code should include a division operation where the result width is determined by the numerator (narrower operand), requiring truncation of the wider denominator operand
